data.title: Economist Paul Krugman warns Trump's interference with Federal Reserve could lead to disaster. Market impact may be late.
data.description: Renowned economist Paul Krugman has sounded the alarm over President Donald Trump's interference with the Federal Reserve's autonomy. In his recent newsletter, Krugman expressed deep concern about Trump's actions, particularly the attempted dismissal of Fed Governor Lisa Cook due to unverified allegations. Krugman labeled Trump's economic approach as 'Crackpot Economics' and warned that these recent events are alarming and unsettling for those monitoring economic policies. The economist fears a high likelihood that the Federal Reserve's independence could be compromised in the near future, emphasizing that Trump and his associates are willing to harm anyone who opposes them. Additionally, Christopher Waller has shown support for a 25 basis point increase. Full details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Marvell Technology sells auto unit for $2.5 billion to focus on data center and AI; Data center segment grew 69% YoY, accounting for 74% of total revenue.
data.description: Marvell Technology Inc. sold its automotive Ethernet business for $2.5 billion in an all-cash deal to shift focus to data center and artificial intelligence markets. The sale emphasizes Marvell's commitment to its main growth engine, with the data center segment now generating 74% of its revenue and growing 69% year-over-year. The CEO highlighted a "massive AI opportunity" ahead and plans to streamline financial reporting into "Data Center" and "Communications and Other" segments. The company intends to continue its buyback program with the proceeds from the sale. Proceeds offer financial flexibility for Marvell's strategic investments.
THAI COURT READING ONGOING
